name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash on Blanco Rd in San Antonio, TX offers fast payday and title loans with same-day approval.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is located at 8542 Blanco Rd #1 in San Antonio, TX, in a standalone storefront easily accessible from major roads in the area. The San Antonio branch is open Monday through Thursday from 9AM to 7PM, Friday 8AM to 8PM, and Saturday 10AM to 6PM, with no Sunday hours. This convenient location on Blanco Road makes it easy for San Antonio residents to stop by during their commute or shopping trips.

This San Antonio location specializes in payday loans, title loans, and cash advances for residents who need quick funding. You can apply in person at the storefront or call +1 210-349-7552 to discuss your options before visiting. The team at this location can explain terms, answer questions about collateral or documentation requirements, and process applications the same day.

When visiting the Speedy Cash branch at 8542 Blanco Rd in San Antonio, TX, bring a valid ID, proof of income (recent pay stub or bank statement), and your vehicle title if applying for a title loan. This storefront is ideal for San Antonio borrowers who need immediate cash without waiting days for approval.
pros: Multiple loan products available: payday loans, lines of credit, and title loans up to $4,000
Same-day or next-business-day funding available for qualified applicants
Extended hours including evening (until 7pm) and weekend service (open Saturdays 9am-4pm)
In-store staff available to explain terms and answer questions before signing loan documents
Transparent pricing: applicants know exact cost upfront before committing
Flexible line of credit product allows drawing only what's needed up to approved limit
Multiple nearby locations in Memphis area (9 stores listed) for convenient access
Additional money services: check cashing, wire transfers, money orders in-store
cons: Payday loans capped at $425, requiring multiple loans or products for larger needs
No specific APR or fee information disclosed on website; actual costs unknown to consumers browsing
Requires valid government ID, proof of employment/income, and proof of address—excludes unemployed and undocumented consumers
Short repayment terms (payday loans due next pay period) increase risk of repeat borrowing and debt cycles
Title loans require vehicle appraisal in-store and clear title, which may be unavailable to many borrowers
best_for: Employed consumers needing $100-$425 urgently with stable next paycheck
Vehicle owners with unexpected expenses who can secure title loans up to $4,000
Consumers who prefer in-person interaction and staff guidance over online-only lenders
Customers needing check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers alongside lending
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed consumers in Memphis seeking fast emergency cash of $425 or less, or vehicle owners needing larger title loans. The main caveat is that payday and title loans typically carry high interest rates and short terms that can trap borrowers in debt cycles; consumers should exhaust alternatives (employer advances, credit unions, family) before applying.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card services
